title: God’s Knights Close In
description: On pages 2–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Children, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Giants as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The lift asidends to the Sun Realm!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There are three FOES UP there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Their objective is clear...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They plan to abduct ten children from Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: whur...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...and take them to the holy land.

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: The children will serve as living shields...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: leverage to turn the warriors of Elbaf into Battle Thralls.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Three humans did all this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To think that not even the giant warrior pirates or ya-san could stop them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Sorry. I have no excuse.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They may be kids, but they're still giants, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can three people our size move them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: One of the three is a woman...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...with a strange arrow ability. The children are unable to resist her.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They just keep marching toward the West Village Harbor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's all over if they reach a ship and escape to sea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It'll all come down to that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why can't we just take back the kids?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of the three is a man named summers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I know a bit about him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He became a briar man after eating the thorn-thorn fruit!! He can freely manipulate vines with sharp thorns!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The Vines can become transparent...

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: ...and he's wrapped them around the children.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we can't grab them?! That's so cruel!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed. They're as tough as iron. If we clumsily try to get the kids to break their line formation, they'll turn into pin cushions.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been set up so that they'll hurt each other!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And on top of that... the last one seems to have the power to make nightmares come true!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The things the kids find scary have come to life to prevent their escape!!

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
